query:
ALTER TABLE `ail_org_context`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `background_inputs_json` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `capability_assessment_json` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `facilitator_notes_json` text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `prework_completed_at` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `session_completed_at` timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `draft_generation_state` enum('none','generating','initial_draft','curated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none';
